title: TNT Tweak
description: Add some interaction between TNT and LAVA
body:
Are you tired of battling the fiery menace of lava in the treacherous depths of the Nether? Look no further! Introducing our groundbreaking Minecraft mod that revolutionizes the way you deal with lava encounters.

With this innovative addition, TNT becomes your ultimate ally in the fight against molten chaos(LOL). No longer will you have to endure the frustration of painstakingly clearing out lava block by block. Instead, watch as TNT swiftly reacts upon contact with lava, triggering a powerful explosion that not only obliterates any nearby obstacles but also effortlessly clears out the bothersome lava pools.

Say goodbye to the lava-laden woes of the Nether and embrace a new era of convenience and efficiency with our TNT mod.

### **Note: Lava will not be cleared if Carpet's optimizedTNT is enabled.**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1644b0c72367c3df6d400eac67713f4d672b7b6.png)
